name: Chicken and Sausage Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Spicy smoked sausage, such as andouille
2 Whole chicken breasts, Boneless, skinless, sliced
4 Anaheim or poblano chili peppers, seeded and diced
2 can (28 oz each) Diced tomatoes with their liquid
1 cup Beef broth or chicken broth
4 cans (16 oz each) Beans, preferably a mix of pinto, black and navy beans, rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small dish, combine chili powder, ground cumin, pure ground chili, and salt. Set aside.
2. Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat. Add sausage and chicken; cook until the chicken is no longer pink. Remove with a slotted spoon and set aside.
3. Add onions, garlic, and half of the reserved seasoning mixture to the pot. Cook until onions begin to soften, about 5 minutes.
4. Stir in tomatillos, peppers, jalapeno, diced tomatoes, their liquid, 1 cup of broth or tomato paste. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and add chicken, sausage, and beans. Cook gently, partially covered, for 30 minutes.
5. Sprinkle remaining seasoning mixture over the chili and cook for an additional 5 minutes, adding more broth if needed.
